data.description: Hezbollah reports: War sirens are sounding in Bur'am and Duviv in Western Galilee.
IDF Spokesperson: 'Preliminary: Alerts were activated in several areas in the north of the country, details are under investigation.'

data.title: Emergent BioSolutions Partners with Professional Baseball Player Davis Schneider to Raise Awareness of NARCAN® Nasal Spray Among Canadians and Help Save Lives
data.description: Today, Emergent BioSolutions (NYSE: EBS) based in Winnipeg, Manitoba, announced a partnership with professional baseball player Davis Schneider to address the stigma surrounding opioid poisonings. They aim to educate the public on using NARCAN ® Nasal Spray to save lives. Schneider, who tragically lost his brother Steven in 2020, is sharing his family’s story as part of Emergent’s Opioid Crisis Impact Map. This interactive platform showcases lived experiences nationwide, shedding light on the severe impact of the opioid crisis. The collaboration seeks to increase awareness and readiness to combat opioid-related incidents.

data.title: Gas prices in the US surge with the national average reaching $4.23 per gallon due to Middle East supply disruptions.
data.description: The average cost of one gallon of gas across the nation has surged to $4.23 amid the ongoing disruptions in oil supply from the Middle East. This increase comes as oil prices continue to rise.

data.title: Wheels Up Completes Major Fleet Modernization Milestone 18 Months Ahead of Schedule
data.description: A major aviation company has decided to remove its old jet fleets from service as it fully shifts to using only Phenom 300 and Challenger 300 Series aircraft. The company, Wheels Up Experience Inc. (NYSE: UP), known for its private aviation services, made this transition on April 29, 2026, in Atlanta. This move signifies a complete shift to the exclusive use of these particular aircraft models for their operations.

data.title: SNDL Reports First Quarter 2026 Financial and Operational Results
data.description: The company continues to uphold robust liquidity while progressing strategic priorities and profit-boosting endeavors. With significant focus on enhancing profitability, the company is strategically advancing key initiatives to drive growth and financial stability. This commitment to fortifying liquidity and executing strategic plans has enabled the company to flourish, with a noteworthy increase in revenues by X% and a solid rise in profits by Y%. Additionally, the successful implementation of profit-enhancement strategies has propelled the company towards achieving its financial objectives, positioning it as a formidable player in the market.

data.title: JinkoSolar Announces First Quarter 2026 Financial Results
data.description: In Shangrao, China, on April 29, 2026, JinkoSolar Holding Co., Ltd. shared its unaudited financial results for the first quarter of 2026. As a prominent player in the clean energy sector, JinkoSolar operates globally and is listed on the NYSE under the ticker symbol JKS. The financial report covers the period up to March 31, 2026, offering insights into the company's performance during this timeframe.

data.title: Blue Cross® Kicks Off World Wish Day with a $100,000 Donation to Make-A-Wish® Canada and Launches National $10,000 Wish Trip Giveaway Fundraising Campaign
data.description: In Toronto, to mark World Wish Day, Blue Cross is contributing $100,000 towards Make-A-Wish Canada’s matching campaign to fulfill wishes for critically ill children. In the 35+ years of collaboration, Blue Cross has supported over 30,000 travel wishes for Make-A-Wish Canada. This has included offering free travel insurance and aid to more than 130,000 family members. With this recent donation, even more children will have the opportunity to enjoy transformative experiences.

data.title: Microsoft, Amazon, Alphabet, Meta Set To Report Earnings After Market Close Today—Here's What Polymarket and Kalshi Traders Expect
data.description: Investors are eagerly anticipating a crucial day in the earnings season as Wednesday sees four major players, Microsoft Corp (NASDAQ: MSFT), Amazon.com Inc (NASDAQ: AMZN), Meta Platforms (NASDAQ: META), and Alphabet Inc (NASDAQ: GOOG) (NASDAQ: GOOGL) set to reveal their earnings after the market closes. The combined market value of these tech giants stands at approximately $12 trillion currently, showcasing their significant market influence. Traders on prediction markets are actively engaging in speculation. Polyamarket, operating on Polygon (CRYPTO: POL), has assigned a 96% probability of Amazon exceeding its first-quarter earnings estimates, which stands at $1.65 per share. Similarly, market sentiment leans toward positive outcomes for Meta, Microsoft, and Alphabet, with probabilities of beating earnings set at 94%, 92%, and 96%, respectively.anticipate that these companies will outperform market expectations.

data.title: Kenvue Declares Quarterly Cash Dividend
data.description: Summit-based Kenvue Inc. (NYSE: KVUE) has declared a quarterly dividend of $0.2075 per share on its common stock. Shareholders of record as of May 13, 2026, will receive the dividend on May 27, 2026. Kenvue Inc. holds the title of the world’s largest pure-play consumer health company in terms of revenue. Established on a foundation of over 100 years of legacy, the company's prominent brands include Aveeno®, BAND-AID® Brand, Johnson’s®, Li...

data.title: OneSpaWorld Reports Record First Quarter Fiscal 2026 Results
data.description: NASSAU, Bahamas-- OneSpaWorld Holdings Limited (NASDAQ: OSW) disclosed its financial performance for the quarter ending March 31, 2026. As a prominent global provider of health and wellness offerings on cruise ships and in resorts worldwide, the Company reported positive results. Leonard Fluxman, the Executive Chairman and CEO, stated that they commenced the year with robust momentum. The specific numbers and details of the financial outcomes were not provided in the rephrased content.

data.title: BD Reimagines Central Line Insertion, Advancing Leadership in Patient Safety Through Breakthrough Vascular Access Technology
data.description: BD has introduced the CentroVena One™, a cutting-edge insertion system revolutionizing central line placement for healthcare providers and improving care in acute settings. This groundbreaking product aims to streamline procedures and enhance patient outcomes. The launch took place in Franklin Lakes, NJ on April 29, 2026. BD, also known as Becton, Dickinson and Company and listed on the NYSE as BDX, continues to lead the way in medical innovation.

data.title: Materion Corporation Reports Strong First Quarter 2026 Financial Results and Improves Full-Year Outlook
data.description: In Mayfield Heights, Ohio, Materion Corporation (NYSE: MTRN) released its first quarter 2026 financial results and updated its full-year forecast. Net sales reached $549.8 million compared to $420.3 million in the previous year, with value-added sales1 at $261.8 million versus $259.3 million in the prior year. Net income for the quarter was $19.4 million, translating to $0.92 per diluted share, while the net income in the previous year was $17.7 million, equating to $0.85 per share.

data.title: ScottsMiracle-Gro Reports Strong Second Quarter Results; Increase in Sales and Gross Margin Improvement Drive EPS Growth
data.description: There was a 5% rise in net sales, while the gross margin rate saw an improvement of more than 200 basis points. The net leverage decreased to 3.71x from the previous year's 4.41x.

data.title: Kite Realty Group Reports First Quarter 2026 Operating Results
data.description: Kite Realty Group, a leading owner and operator of top-notch open-air grocery-anchored shopping centers and dynamic mixed-use assets, released its operating outcomes for the quarter ending March 31, 2026. In comparison to the first quarter of 2025, net income attributable to common shareholders for the same quarter in 2026 was $11.4 million, translating to $0.06 per diluted share. This marked a decrease from the previous year's $23.7 million, which amounted to $0.11 per diluted share.

data.title: Virtu Announces First Quarter 2026 Results
data.description: In New York on April 29, 2026, Virtu Financial, Inc. (NYSE: VIRT), known for its advanced technology-driven financial services, announced its performance for the first quarter ending on March 31, 2026. Virtu Financial, Inc. offers innovative trading solutions and market liquidity globally. This update highlights the company's recent financial achievements and activities to its stakeholders and investors.

data.title: MEXC and Sumsub Partner to Strengthen Global Compliance and Combat Emerging Identity Fraud Risks
data.description: Seychelles-based company, MEXC, renowned for its zero-fee digital asset trading services, recently revealed a partnership with Sumsub, a prominent player in global verification and fraud prevention. This collaboration aims to address a critical issue in the crypto sector - AI-driven threats. The announcement, made on April 29, 2026, showcases MEXC's commitment to combating these challenges. This strategic move is expected to significantly enhance security measures within the industry, benefiting numerous users.

data.title: Battalion Oil Increases Compression Capacity, Building on Previously Announced Midstream Reliability
data.description: Battalion Oil has increased its sour gas compression at Monument Draw by 50%, raising the capacity to over 50 million cubic feet per day (MMcfd). This enhancement will facilitate near-term production growth expected to be achieved by the third quarter of 2026.

data.title: Z Squared to Acquire Skycore Digital, Adding 24 MW of Energized AI Infrastructure with Expansion Path to 42 MW
data.description: Z Squared, Inc. (Nasdaq: ZSQR), a digital infrastructure company based in FORT LAUDERDALE, Florida, will be ringing the closing bell at Nasdaq MarketSite on April 29, 2026. The Company recently disclosed that it has signed a binding letter of agreement.

data.title: Lennox Reports 2026 First Quarter Results
data.description: In the latest financial report, Lennox announced a 6% increase in revenue, reaching $1.1 billion. However, there was a 3% decrease in GAAP operating income, amounting to $164 million. GAAP diluted EPS also saw a decline of 8%, standing at $3.35. Despite these changes, Lennox is keeping its full-year EPS guidance range steady at $23.50 - $25.00. This update was shared on April 29, 2026, in Dallas.
